---
title: "About Me"
---

```{=html}
<div class="page-section">
  <div class="about-grid">

    <div class="about-photo-col">
      <img src="assets/profile.jpg" alt="Mo Boroumand" class="about-photo"
           onerror="this.src='https://via.placeholder.com/260x260/1a237e/ffffff?text=MB'">
    </div>

    <div class="about-text-col">
      <h2>Hi, I'm Mo 👋</h2>

      <!-- ============================================================
           FILL IN YOUR BIO BELOW
           ============================================================ -->
      <p>
        [Your bio paragraph 1 — who you are, what you do, what drives you.]
      </p>
      <p>
        [Your bio paragraph 2 — background, education, or key interests.]
      </p>
      <p>
        [Your bio paragraph 3 — hobbies, personal side, or what you're currently working on.]
      </p>

      <h3>What I'm interested in</h3>
      <ul>
        <li>[Interest 1]</li>
        <li>[Interest 2]</li>
        <li>[Interest 3]</li>
        <li>[Interest 4]</li>
      </ul>

      <h3>Connect with me</h3>
      <div class="social-links">
        <a href="https://github.com/moboroumand" class="social-btn github">
          <i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub
        </a>
        <a href="https://linkedin.com/in/moboroumand" class="social-btn linkedin">
          <i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i> LinkedIn
        </a>
        <a href="https://twitter.com/moboroumand" class="social-btn twitter">
          <i class="bi bi-twitter-x"></i> Twitter / X
        </a>
        <a href="mailto:mohamad.boroumand@gmail.com" class="social-btn email">
          <i class="bi bi-envelope-fill"></i> Email
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>
```
